items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Workspace Agents".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=Workspace agents published=Wed, 22 Apr 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/academy/workspace-agents description=Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
diff_excerpt: description=Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.
-description=Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.
title=How to get started with Codex
description=Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
-description=Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.
description=Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
+description=Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
title=Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
description=A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
-description=Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
